summary: Iteration 59: Verified new /api/intel/sheet endpoint (flat spreadsheet view) and IntelTab.jsx frontend. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with sortable columns, filter pills, sport toggle, and sticky Player column.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing settled picks in preview DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59 verified the new INTEL spreadsheet view. Key findings: (1) GET /api/intel/sheet returns rows array with all 19 columns: player, position, prop, rec, line, proj, actual, error, errDir, result, league, venue, gameType, matchResult, score, confidence, role, opponent, team, edge, timestamp. (2) Sheet endpoint is owner-only (josselj001@gmail.com). (3) Error direction logic works: errDir='over' when error < -0.5, errDir='under' when error > 0.5, empty otherwise. (4) Frontend IntelTab.jsx renders spreadsheet with sortable column headers (click to toggle asc/desc), filter pills (All/Hits/Misses/Push and Over/Under), sport toggle (Soccer/Basketball), and sticky Player column on horizontal scroll. (5) Soccer data: 15 picks, 80% rate (12 hits, 3 misses). Basketball data: 11 picks. (6) All data types correct: numeric fields (line, proj, actual, error, confidence) are numbers, string fields are strings.

backend_api.error_direction_logic: errDir='over' when error < -0.5, errDir='under' when error > 0.5, empty otherwise
backend_api.sorting: Rows sorted by timestamp descending (newest first)
